description: Overlay FreeText annotations onto a non-fillable PDF using per-field entry bounding boxes and text, transforming from image or PDF coordinates into pypdf's coordinate space. Writes a new annotated PDF. Wraps pypdf.
rules: reads the input PDF + a fields JSON (pages[] + form_fields[] with entry_bounding_box and entry_text); writes a new PDF (input untouched)
supports both image-pixel coords (image_width/image_height) and native PDF coords (pdf_width)
annotated PDF is written to record_store/annotated.pdf; a manifest line goes to fill_annotations.txt
needs pypdf at runtime; absent -> manifest note + exit 0
usage: Set PDF_PATH (input .pdf) and FIELDS_JSON (with pages[] dimensions + form_fields[] entry boxes/text). Outputs: annotated.pdf + fill_annotations.txt. Use extract-structure + check-boxes first to derive valid coordinates.
limitation: FreeText overlays sit on top of the page; this does not create real form fields. Coordinate space in the JSON must match the page. Requires pypdf.
